expectations.text: CollectionView displays messages from an ObservableCollection
expectations.evidence: ChatViewModel.cs line 15: 'public ObservableCollection<Message> Messages { get; } = new ObservableCollection<Message>();' and ChatPage.xaml line 109: 'ItemsSource="{Binding Messages}"'

expectations.text: Message alignment differs by sender — right-aligned for current user, left-aligned for others
expectations.evidence: ChatPage.xaml lines 122-155: a Grid with 'IsVisible="{Binding IsFromMe}"' and 'HorizontalOptions="End"' for the current user's bubble; lines 158-197: a Grid with 'IsVisible="{Binding IsFromMe, Converter={x:StaticResource InvertedBoolConverter}}"' and 'HorizontalOptions="Start"' for others' bubbles.

expectations.text: Code calls CollectionView.ScrollTo() to scroll to the last message when new messages arrive
expectations.evidence: ChatPage.xaml.cs lines 41-44: 'MessagesCollectionView.ScrollTo(item: lastMessage, position: ScrollToPosition.End, animate: true);'

expectations.text: A CollectionChanged or property-change handler triggers the scroll behavior
expectations.evidence: ChatViewModel.cs line 34: 'public event EventHandler<Message>? MessageAdded;' raised after adding each message (lines 82, 101). ChatPage.xaml.cs lines 24-30: 'private void OnMessageAdded(object? sender, Message message) { MainThread.BeginInvokeOnMainThread(() => ScrollToLastMessage()); }'. Note: CollectionChanged is not used directly; the custom MessageAdded event fulfills the intent of this assertion.

expectations.text: Message model has properties for content/text, a sender or IsFromMe flag, and optionally timestamp
expectations.evidence: Message.cs lines 7-10: 'public string Text { get; set; }', 'public bool IsFromMe { get; set; }', 'public string SenderName { get; set; }', 'public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; }'
